instructions.name: activate_cycle_with_quote_sol
docs: Activates a quoted cycle paid in native SOL and records all treasury side effects.

instructions.name: activate_cycle_with_quote_spl
docs: Activates a quoted cycle paid in SPL tokens and records all treasury side effects.

instructions.name: claim_approved_coverage_payout
docs: Lets a claimant or active delegate pull an already approved coverage payout.

instructions.name: create_pool
docs: Creates the base pool, terms, and oracle-policy accounts for a new protocol pool.

instructions.name: register_oracle
docs: Registers a rich oracle profile used by the staking and attestation flows.

instructions.name: settle_coverage_claim
docs: Finalizes a coverage claim payout from the pool treasury.

instructions.name: settle_cycle_commitment
docs: Settles an SPL-backed cycle commitment after the quoted period closes.

instructions.name: settle_cycle_commitment_sol
docs: Settles a SOL-backed cycle commitment after the quoted period closes.

instructions.name: submit_coverage_claim
docs: Opens a coverage claim tied to the active policy and claimant intent.

instructions.name: submit_outcome_attestation_vote
docs: Records an oracle attestation vote for a member and cycle outcome.

accounts.name: stake_position
docs: without requiring an initialized stake position account.

errors.name: PoolIdTooLong
errors.msg: Pool id exceeds maximum seed length

errors.name: PoolNotOpenForEnrollment
errors.msg: Pool is not open for enrollment

errors.name: OracleRegistryNotActive
errors.msg: Oracle registry entry is not active

errors.name: OracleVoteWindowClosed
errors.msg: Outcome aggregate reached maximum vote window

errors.name: PayoutAmountMismatch
errors.msg: Payout amount must match pool payout configuration

errors.name: InsufficientPoolRentReserve
errors.msg: Payout would violate pool rent reserve

errors.name: PolicySeriesMetadataUriTooLong
errors.msg: Coverage product metadata URI too long

errors.name: PolicySeriesPremiumScheduleInvalid
errors.msg: Coverage product premium schedule is invalid

errors.name: PolicySeriesPaymentOptionInvalid
errors.msg: Coverage product payment option is invalid

errors.name: PolicySeriesPaymentOptionInactive
errors.msg: Coverage product payment option is inactive

errors.name: PolicySeriesPolicyMismatch
errors.msg: Coverage product does not match the active policy terms

errors.name: OracleSupportedSchemaLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Oracle supported schema list exceeds maximum

errors.name: LiquidityConfigMismatch
errors.msg: Pool liquidity configuration does not match expected pool asset state

errors.name: ShareMintMismatch
errors.msg: Pool share mint does not match liquidity configuration

errors.name: InsufficientSharesOut
errors.msg: Insufficient shares out for requested deposit

errors.name: PoolLiquidityRequiresZeroTvl
errors.msg: Pool liquidity bootstrap requires zero TVL

errors.name: InvalidPayoutAssetForLiquidity
errors.msg: Invalid payout asset for liquidity flow

errors.name: SchemaCloseRequiresUnverified
errors.msg: Schema must be unverified before close

errors.name: SchemaCloseDisabled
errors.msg: Schema close is disabled until dependency tracking is implemented

errors.name: MemberPayerMismatch
errors.msg: Member and payer must match for this flow

errors.name: QuoteAmountExceedsConfiguredBase
errors.msg: Quoted amount exceeds the configured base payment amount

errors.name: MemberCycleAlreadyExists
errors.msg: Member cycle already exists for this period

errors.name: CycleCommitmentNotEnabled
errors.msg: Commitment is not enabled for this cycle

errors.name: ShieldNotAvailable
errors.msg: Shield is not available for this cycle

errors.name: CohortSettlementAlreadyFinalized
errors.msg: Cohort settlement root is already finalized

errors.name: CohortSettlementNotFinalized
errors.msg: Cohort settlement root must be finalized before claim

errors.name: HealthAlphaOutcomeMismatch
errors.msg: Settled health alpha score does not match the declared outcome

errors.name: HealthAlphaScoreRequired
errors.msg: Settled health alpha score is required

errors.name: CohortClaimCountExceeded
errors.msg: Cohort claim count exceeded successful member count

errors.name: PoolRiskControlUnauthorized
errors.msg: Pool risk control update is unauthorized

errors.name: AttestationEvidenceMismatch
errors.msg: Attestation evidence commitment does not match the aggregate

errors.name: AttestationExternalReferenceMismatch
errors.msg: Attestation external reference does not match the aggregate

errors.name: InvalidCoverageClaimStateTransition
errors.msg: Coverage claim state transition is invalid

errors.name: CoverageClaimPayoutExceedsReservedAmount
errors.msg: Coverage claim payout exceeds the reserved amount

errors.name: CoverageClaimRecoveryExceedsPaidAmount
errors.msg: Coverage claim recovery exceeds the paid amount

errors.name: ComplianceBindingRequired
errors.msg: Compliance binding is required for this action

errors.name: ComplianceRailRestriction
errors.msg: Compliance rail restriction blocks this action

errors.name: AutomationNotPermitted
errors.msg: Automation metadata is not permitted for this pool

errors.name: OutcomeChallengeWindowActive
errors.msg: Outcome challenge window is still active

errors.name: RedemptionRequestNotMatured
errors.msg: Redemption request notice period has not matured

errors.name: SchemaRuleReferencesOutstanding
errors.msg: Schema still has enabled pool-rule references

types.name: MembershipRecord
docs: Member record shared by enrollment, rewards, coverage, and cycle activation flows.

types.name: OracleProfile
docs: Rich oracle profile used by the oracle onboarding and staking flows.

types.name: OracleRegistryEntry
docs: Registry entry that records whether an oracle pubkey is currently active.

types.name: Pool
docs: Core pool account shared by reward, coverage, membership, and liquidity flows.

types.name: PoolOracleApproval
docs: Approval record that links a pool to an oracle pubkey.
